description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake Build that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build-ubuntu and build-mac. The build-ubuntu job runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up Python 3.11, installs Conan, and performs a series of build and verification steps. The build-mac job runs on macos-latest, sets up Python 3.11, installs required libraries, and performs build and verification steps.
